description: Russian criminal syndicate founded in the late 1980s by Sergei Mikhailov and Viktor Averin in Moscow. It is one of the most powerful Russian mafia groups, involved in drug trafficking, extortion, and money laundering. The organization has international operations, particularly in Europe.

country_links.evidence_quote: Mikhailov had purchased a 800,000 Swiss franc villa in Borex, Vaud... On 16 October 1996, Mikhas was arrested in at the Cointrin Airport, Geneva, Switzerland
country_links.context: The organization's leader purchased a villa in Switzerland and was arrested there, indicating the organization has assets and presence in the country.
